title: strychnos fallax
intro: Strychnos fallax, a species of flowering plant in the family Loganiaceae, is native to tropical Africa. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating skin conditions, wounds, and inflammation due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Strychnos fallax include its ability to promote wound healing, reduce pain and swelling, and protect against bacterial and fungal infections. Herbal preparations of Strychnos fallax can be made into a paste or powder and applied topically to affected areas, or used as an ingredient in traditional remedies.
